## How to test it

     "It compiles" is not enough. If it is UI work, include a screenshot. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have run `go test ./...` and all tests pass
- [ ] I have run `golangci-lint run ./...` and there are no lint errors
- [ ] I have run `npm run lint` and `npm run format:check` if I changed frontend code
- [ ] I have added tests for new behaviour (or explained why tests are not needed)
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` if this changes behaviour
- [ ] My commit messages follow the Conventional Commits format (`feat:`, `fix:`, etc.)
